hooks.command: echo '[H-1 SEARCH-FIRST GUARD] Before writing: (1) Did you SEARCH the codebase first? (2) Is this a FULL implementation — no stubs, no TODOs, no placeholders? (3) Is this file within your allowed remit per AGENTS.md?'
echo '[H-2 DESTRUCTIVE GUARD] Before bash: check for rm -rf, DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, reset migrations, unapproved npm install. STOP if destructive or outside your remit.'
echo '[H-3 SECRET SCAN] Post-write: scan for API keys, Supabase URLs, service role keys, passwords, tokens. If found, replace with env vars from .env.example.'
echo '[H-4 POPIA CHECK] Post-write: if this file handles personal data (profiles, auth, favourites, saved_searches, audit_log), ensure the POPIA ANNOTATION header is present per CLAUDE.md Rule 5.'
echo '[H-5 FILE SIZE LINT] Post-write: source files must be ≤300 lines (CLAUDE.md Rule 7). Planning docs and migrations are exempt. If over limit, refactor into smaller modules.'

echo '[H-6 SESSION CLOSE] Before stopping: (1) PLAN.md updated? (2) CLAUDE.md CURRENT_PHASE line accurate? (3) Changes committed? (4) Open questions logged in docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md? (5) Deviations logged in docs/PLAN_DEVIATIONS.md?'
